hero.headline: Protect What
hero.subheadline: Professional installation of security cameras, intercom systems, structured cabling, and IT infrastructure across Greater Boston.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: End-to-end solutions for residential and commercial clients across Greater Boston.

items.title: Security Cameras
items.description: Professional installation of digital surveillance systems for homes and businesses. Indoor, outdoor, day & night coverage — fully customized to your property. See everything, from anywhere, at any time.

items.title: Orbis for Buildings
items.description: Orbis is a digital signage platform that turns any screen into a smart virtual directory for your building. DTX Solution installs and manages the lobby displays — tenants and visitors always see up-to-date building information.

items.title: Website Development
items.description: Custom-coded, responsive websites for small and medium businesses. Modern design, zero headaches — we handle everything from development to hosting, domain, and ongoing maintenance.

items.title: Intercom Systems
items.description: Modern IP intercom and access control systems for residential buildings and commercial properties. Manage entry from anywhere, on any device.

items.title: Structured Cabling
items.description: Clean, professional network and low-voltage cabling for homes and businesses. From Cat6 data runs to coaxial and fiber — installed right the first time.

items.title: Microsoft IT Services
items.description: Enterprise-grade IT services with deep Microsoft expertise. From Windows Server administration to Endpoint security policies and fleet management.

trust.title: Why Choose DTX Solution
trust.subtitle: We bring enterprise-level expertise to every project, regardless of size.

items.title: Certified Expertise
items.description: MCSE-certified with years of enterprise experience managing complex environments across multiple countries.

items.title: Local & Responsive
items.description: Based in Reading, MA — fast response times and on-site service anywhere in Greater Boston.

items.title: Turnkey Solutions
items.description: We handle everything: design, installation, configuration, and ongoing support.

items.title: Security-First Mindset
items.description: Every solution is designed with security baselines and best practices from day one.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to secure your property or upgrade your infrastructure? Let's talk.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch shortly.

footer.tagline: Smart security and IT solutions for Greater Boston.
